gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.size < 2.0 RETURN u ORDER BY u.size DESC LIMIT 5

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.x ASC LIMIT 5

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User) RETURN u.label AS user, (u.area + u.size) AS total ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5
